descriptionInUI: MOOSE MANTIS IADS engine — the sole IADS engine (Skynet removed). Provides SAM/EWR networking, emissions control, engagement tuning, EWR shoot-and-scoot, comms/power/command-center degradation (advanced IADS), and the SEAD-triggered point-defense link (a site's co-located SHORAD sleeps until a HARM/Maverick is fired at the SAM it guards, then wakes to intercept the shot).

specificOptions.nameInUI: Create IADS for RED coalition
Create IADS for BLUE coalition
Emissions control (SAM radars dark until EWR-cued; OFF = SAMs self-search and engage reliably)
SAM engagement range (% of max interceptor range)
Detection update interval (s)
EWR detection grouping radius (NM)
Max simultaneously-active short-range SAMs per threat (0 = unlimited)
Max simultaneously-active medium-range SAMs per threat (0 = unlimited)
Max simultaneously-active long-range SAMs per threat (0 = unlimited)
Max simultaneously-active point-defense SAMs per threat (0 = unlimited)
EWR shoot-and-scoot: periodically relocate mobile EWRs
SEAD-triggered point defense (PD sleeps until a HARM/Maverick is fired at its SAM, then wakes to intercept; OFF = PD always alert)
Point-defense wake duration after a trigger (s)
Point-defense defense radius around the guarded SAMs (NM)
SEAD-suppression wake reach (PD wakes when a SAM within this range is suppressed, NM)
Advanced C2: degrade SAMs when their comms/power/command centers die
On comms loss, take the SAM fully dark (off) instead of autonomous
C2 degradation poll interval (s)
Generate debug information for RED IADS
Generate debug information for BLUE IADS
